title: bayesian-shelf-life-arrhenius: reproducibility package for Bayesian multi-temperature shelf-life prediction (paper-A)
description: Reproducibility package for a synthetic-data simulation study comparing four estimators of pharmaceutical shelf life from accelerated stability data: a two-stage OLS/conjugate Bayesian procedure, full MCMC (NUTS), classical multi-temperature OLS, and the ICH Q1E long-term baseline, across 81 core cases and 20 robustness cases, extending Faya et al. (2018). Contains code and synthetic data only (every truth.json carries data_class="synthetic"); no measured or third-party stability data, and no manuscript text, are included. Code is MIT-licensed; data (paper_a/data, paper_a/results, paper_a/figures) is CC-BY-4.0.
